title: Scones
instructions: Proof 4 tbsp yeast and 1 cup water with 1 tbsp sugar added to water.
Mix all ingredients together (yeast mixture, salt, sugar, oil, powdered milk, water, flour, and eggs).
Roll out ½ inch thick and cut out.
Drop into hot oil and cook until puffed and golden.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with butter and jam.
notes: Recipe makes enough for 40 people (can be cut in half)
Can be used as a base for tacos or tostadas
Traditional Halloween night treat from Mary Ann Back
